gitCommit.subject: feat: richer monitoring dashboard (trends, KPIs, timeline) (#20)
gitCommit.body:
feat: richer monitoring dashboard (trends, KPIs, timeline) (#20)

* docs: add richer monitoring dashboard design spec

* docs: add richer monitoring dashboard implementation plan

* test: add dashboard test project and metrics.runStatus

* feat: add capRuns, summaryValue, totalReports to dashboard metrics

* feat: add computeKpis and buildPassRateSeries to dashboard metrics

* refactor: extract dashboard html helpers into html.mjs

* feat: add pass-rate chart and status timeline generators

* feat: render KPI cards, pass-rate chart and status timeline on dashboard home

* feat: cap dashboard history and prune old run folders

* style: add KPI, chart and timeline styles to dashboard

* ci: run dashboard unit tests and gate deploy on them

* docs: document dashboard widgets, retention cap and unit tests

* chore: drop dashboard unit tests and CI job, keep dashboard implementation

* chore: stop tracking docs/ folder

subs.title: standard user can log in and land on inventory @smoke @ui @auth
locked out user sees a clear login error @ui @auth @negative
user can add and remove an item from the cart @smoke @ui @cart
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
Click locator('[data-test="cart-list"] [data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Remove' })
user can complete checkout for selected products @smoke @ui @checkout
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Bike Light' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
user can sort products by price from low to high @ui @catalog
